max_potion.name: Max Potion
max_potion.description: Fully restores HP to one Pokemon.

burn_heal.name: Burn Heal
burn_heal.description: Cures a burn from one Pokemon.

full_heal.name: Full Heal
full_heal.description: Cures all status conditions of one Pokemon.

revive.name: Revive
revive.description: Revives a fainted Pokemon with half its HP.

pokeball.name: Poke Ball
pokeball.description: A device for catching wild Pokemon.

great_ball.name: Great Ball
great_ball.description: A high-performance Ball with a higher catch rate.

ultra_ball.name: Ultra Ball
ultra_ball.description: An ultra-high performance Ball with a very high catch rate.

master_ball.name: Master Ball
master_ball.description: The best Ball. Catches any wild Pokemon without fail.

rare_candy.name: Rare Candy
rare_candy.description: Raises the level of one Pokemon by 1.

repel.name: Repel
repel.description: Prevents weak wild Pokemon from appearing for 100 steps.

super_repel.name: Super Repel
super_repel.description: Prevents weak wild Pokemon from appearing for 200 steps.

escape_rope.name: Escape Rope
escape_rope.description: Warps back to the entrance of a dungeon.

town_map.name: Town Map
town_map.description: Shows the layout of the region.

pokedex.name: Pokedex
pokedex.description: A high-tech encyclopedia that records data on all Pokemon.
